column8: ___ played a joke on him. Do you know ___ who could do it?

column12: Shall we have ___ new in our class? A boy or a girl?

column15: I would like ___ to eat and ___ to talk to.
column17: I saw ___ bright in the tree. But my aunt said she didn't see ___. May be it was a leaf.
